critic_findings.message: test_audit_trail.sh is 301 lines, exceeds max 300. Writer's 2-line addition (comment + SDLC_TESTING export) pushed it from 299 to 301. gate-filesize.sh FAILS on this file. Fix: remove 1+ line (collapse the added comment or merge the two export lines).

_render_report is 95 lines (max 50). Function is currently invisible to gate-complexity because audit_render.py is untracked, but the gate will FAIL on the first post-commit run. Fix: extract the plan-table rendering block and the audit-trail details block into helper functions.

_render_report has cyclomatic complexity 23 (max 8). Driven by chained if/for blocks for plan/trail/duration/tools/unplanned/orphaned rendering. gate-complexity will FAIL once the file is committed. Fix: extract sub-renderers — each handles one conditional branch.
